journey.name: 06-analytics
journey.description: 统计图表：饼图/折线/分类统计/切换月份。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the analytics/statistics (统计) screen
Verify a pie chart and/or line chart renders without crashing
Switch the time period to a different month
Verify the chart updates without crashing
Tap into a category to open the typed/per-category analytics screen
Verify the per-category analytics screen renders without crashing
